# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Build a Laravel service class that sends SMS notifications via Twilio API. The service should handle authentication and message sending. Configure the class to read Twilio credentials from the appropriate configuration source.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

<?php

namespace App\Services;

use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Config;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Http;
use Illuminate\Http\Client\PendingRequest;
use Illuminate\Http\Client\RequestException;

class TwilioSmsService
{
    protected string $accountSid;
    protected string $authToken;
    protected string $from;
    protected string $baseUrl;

    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->accountSid = (string) Config::get('services.twilio.account_sid');
        $this->authToken  = (string) Config::get('services.twilio.auth_token');
        $this->from       = (string) Config::get('services.twilio.from');
        $this->baseUrl    = 'https://api.twilio.com/2010-04-01';
    }

    public function send(string $to, string $message, ?string $from = null): array
    {
        $this->assertConfigured();

        $fromNumber = $from ?? $this->from;

        $response = $this->client()
            ->asForm()
            ->post($this->messagesUrl(), [
                'To'   => $to,
                'From' => $fromNumber,
                'Body' => $message,
            ]);

        $response->throw();

        return $response->json() ?? [];
    }

    protected function client(): PendingRequest
    {
        return Http::withBasicAuth($this->accountSid, $this->authToken)
            ->acceptJson()
            ->timeout((int) Config::get('services.twilio.timeout', 30))
            ->retry((int) Config::get('services.twilio.retries', 0), (int) Config::get('services.twilio.retry_delay_ms', 200));
    }

    protected function messagesUrl(): string
    {
        return rtrim($this->baseUrl, '/') . '/Accounts/' . $this->accountSid . '/Messages.json';
    }

    protected function assertConfigured(): void
    {
        if ($this->accountSid === '' || $this->authToken === '' || $this->from === '') {
            throw new \RuntimeException('Twilio is not configured. Please set services.twilio.account_sid, services.twilio.auth_token, and services.twilio.from.');
        }
    }
}
